detail: Distributed Rosetta bundle established for cross-repo anti-rediscovery bootstrapping.
Mediator, legacy dashboard, ChatDev extension commands, and Dev-Mentor VS Code tasks are now reflected in the control-plane snapshot and registry.
The control-plane snapshot and registry now surface repo-owned ledgers, sqlite stores, startup traces, and legacy current_state archive counts for low-rediscovery state navigation.
SimulatedVerse shared quest log rotation and NuSyQ-Hub obsolete current_state archive indexing are now first-class control-plane maintenance surfaces surfaced through the bundle and cockpit.
